principles.name: Type Safety
principles.description: Every official example uses proper type imports. Zero exceptions.

rules.rule: Extension signature must be typed: export default function (pi: ExtensionAPI)
ctx parameter must be ExtensionContext or ExtensionCommandContext, never any
Tool parameters defined via Type.Object() from @sinclair/typebox
Use StringEnum from @mariozechner/pi-ai for string unions (Google API compatibility)
Event handlers use proper event types from pi SDK

principles.name: Import Discipline
principles.description: Top-level imports only. Peer deps imported directly. Type keyword for type-only imports.

rules.rule: All imports at file top level. No dynamic await import(). No inline imports.
Peer deps imported directly — assumed present at runtime. No shims or fallbacks.
anti_patterns: try { Type = (await import('@sinclair/typebox')).Type } catch { Type = shim }

rules.rule: Use type keyword for type-only imports

principles.name: Error Signaling
principles.description: Throw, don't return errors. Returning error text as content is a silent success to the LLM.

rules.rule: Tool execute must throw on failure, not return error content

principles.name: Tool Registration
principles.description: Consistent tool registration patterns across all extensions.

rules.rule: Tool name is lowercase snake_case
execute signature is (toolCallId, params, signal, onUpdate, ctx) — 5 args
Unused execute params prefixed with _ (e.g., _toolCallId, _signal, _onUpdate)
anti_patterns: execute(toolCallId, params, signal, onUpdate, ctx) — with onUpdate unused

rules.rule: parameters always Type.Object({...}), never raw objects
Provide renderCall/renderResult when tool output is non-trivial

principles.name: State Management
principles.description: State stored in tool result details for branch-correct reconstruction.

rules.rule: Reconstruct state from ctx.sessionManager.getBranch() on session events
State flows through tool result details, not in-memory globals

principles.name: Package Structure
principles.description: ESM, manifest, peer deps with * range, no build step.

rules.rule: package.json has "type": "module"
pi.extensions manifest points to entry file
keywords includes pi-package
Peer deps use "*" version range
Pi packages not in dependencies (peer only)

principles.name: Output Discipline
principles.description: Tools must truncate output to avoid context overflow. Built-in limit: 50KB / 2000 lines.

rules.rule: Truncate large outputs using truncateHead or truncateTail from pi-coding-agent
When truncated, write full output to temp file and tell LLM the path

principles.name: Mode Awareness
principles.description: Check ctx.hasUI before calling UI methods. Graceful degradation in print and JSON modes.

rules.rule: Guard ctx.ui.select(), ctx.ui.input(), and other interactive methods with ctx.hasUI
anti_patterns: const choice = await ctx.ui.select(...)  // no hasUI guard

principles.name: Signal Handling
principles.description: Check signal.aborted in long-running executions. Pass signal to subprocesses.

rules.rule: Check signal?.aborted in loops and long-running operations
Pass signal through to pi.exec() and subprocess spawns

principles.name: Convention Patterns
principles.description: JSDoc headers, underscore-prefix unused params, no require(), no shims.

rules.rule: JSDoc block comment at file top describing what the extension does
Unused params prefixed with _ across all functions, not just execute
No require() calls — ESM only
